void.string:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:DTB="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:EncrPassword="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:LAUUtil="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:RemoveEmojis="RemoveEmojis" xmlns:SafaricomTokenGenerator="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:nestedjson="nestedjson" xmlns:padding="padding" xmlns:ss="ss" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:test_2="test_2" xmlns:testvensys="testvensys" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math DTB EnDe EncrPassword LAUUtil MD5Hex Md5UniCode RemoveEmojis SafaricomTokenGenerator StringLength dateConversion myext nestedjson padding ss strings test_2 testvensys truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="text" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <khqrin> <Amount><xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request,'&')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request),string('&'),string('g'),string('&amp;'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="if1"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($if0,'amp;amp;')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string($if0),string('amp;amp;'),string('g'),string('amp;'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if1"></xsl:value-of><!-- <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($document_Input1/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/Request,'&')"> <xsl:value-of select="myext:replace(string(null),string('&'),string('g'),string('&amp;'))"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of>--></Amount> </khqrin> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="myext" functions="replace"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function compute(expr){ return eval(expr); }
function nextMillenium(){ d = new Date() //today's date mill=new Date(3000, 00, 01, 00, 00, 00) //Next millennium start date diff = mill-d //difference in milliseconds mtg = new String(diff/86400000) //calculate days and convert to string point=mtg.indexOf(".") //find the decimal point days=mtg.substring(0,point) //get just the whole days return "There are only " + days + " days remaining to the start of the next millennium."; }
function replace(input, pattern, flags, str){ return input.replace(new RegExp(pattern, flags), str); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns:tnsd="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns="http://www.fiorano.com/services/serviceName" xmlns:jms="http://www.w3.org/2010/soapjms/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdlsoap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsdlsoap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" targetNamespace="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <xsd:element name="Envelope"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="tnsd:Header"/> <xsd:element ref="tnsd:Body"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Header"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Body"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Request" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="khqrin">
<xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Amount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnFee" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="FromAccount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ToAccount" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Remark" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TransId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CurrenCy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="bakongid" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="frombank" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CreditName" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
